phases.title: 基础前端骨架与答题流程
phases.summary: package.json: initialized Vite/React scripts and deps | src/App.tsx: added home-quiz-result flow | src/App.test.tsx: covered quiz happy path and reset | src/styles/global.css: added mobile-first clay-like tokens and layouts

phases.title: 数据模型、算法与配置系统
phases.summary: src/domain/scoring/*.ts: added scoring, primary selection, and explanation logic | src/domain/company/types.ts: added layered company schema | src/data/questions/questionBank.ts: added 30-question bank | src/data/companies/*.ts: added 40-company registry, copy, score, and governance configs

phases.title: 结果页表达、校验与体验收尾
phases.summary: src/App.tsx: connected question bank, scoring, and guarded result flow | src/features/result/*.tsx: added ready and fallback result UI | src/domain/validation/contentValidation.ts: added result content guards | src/features/quiz/quiz-result-integration.test.tsx: covered quiz-to-result path
